Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4853 "EAGLEEMPIRE-6100-4853" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6100 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Eagle Empire.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $6100 which sets $61 to $0A so that the ship shield sprite animation works correctly.
